title: Any update on transferring app ownership?

posts.author: zackho (Zack)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I came accross this earlier discussion Transferring App Ownership where the ability to transfer app ownership was turned into a feature request. I was just wondering if there’s been any progress since then?

What are you trying to achieve

Right now, there still doesn’t seem to be a way to transfer a live marketplace app to another developer account. It would be super helpful to have an official process (or even a manual one through partner support) for handling ownership transfers, especially when apps need to move between teams or company accounts.

Thanks for taking a look!
